scripts.gate: pnpm run gate:quality && pnpm run gate:e2e
scripts.gate:quality: pnpm -r run lint && pnpm -r run typecheck && pnpm -r run test:coverage && pnpm -F frontend run test:preflight && pnpm -F frontend run build
scripts.gate:e2e: pnpm -F frontend run test:e2e && pnpm -F frontend run test:e2e:c1 && pnpm -F frontend run test:e2e:offline
